result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet gzip PATH-TO-FILE
Usage: dotnet gzip PATH-TO-FILE [OPTIONS]

path-to-file:
  The path to an file to execute.

Options:
  -c,     --compress       Compress.
  -d,     --decompress     Decompress.
  -o,     --output         Output path.
          --base64         Input/Output format of base64 string
  -?, -h, --help           Display help.
